ruleStatement: When the west edge stays damp after a cold night and lower canopy airflow is weak, prune and open the canopy before the next mildew-risk window even if the automated line still looks borderline.
appliesWhen: Early mildew pressure appears in the west-edge frost pocket after cold damp nights.
recommendedAction: Row-selective pruning and canopy opening on the west edge before the next mildew-risk window.
notes: Farm-local heuristic preserved as explicit governed knowledge rather than disappearing into operator memory.
